CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL( SectionExistence__c , "あり") , MachineUnitAmount_RollUp__c + EquipManageCost_Rollup__c + SystemIntegrationFee_Rollup__c + MachineUnitAmountExceptTarget_Rollup__c , MachineUnitAmount_OnlyTarget__c + EquipManageCost_formula__c + SystemIntegrationFee_formula__c + MachineUnitAmountExceptTarget__c)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: 機器単体費(見積対象分のみ)＋機器管理費＋システムインテグレーション費合計＋上記以外の金額合計
CustomField.label: 小計(内部用)
